title: Sai Defies Old Expectations
description: Pages 9–13 focus on sai defies old expectations, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Lao G, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as sai's battle, Baby 5's crisis, and the collapse of old loyalties shift another part of Dressrosa away from Doflamingo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is this how this fight is going to end!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: of all things, that his lifespan would come to an end now...

dialogue.speaker: Lao G
dialogue.text: What!? No way! Lao G! Don't die!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Come back to us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What-?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He can't hear a damn thing but he still came back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Don Chinao, you've grown weak as well.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Oi! SA!! What're you doing!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He has no idea what they're talking about!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What do you mean!?

dialogue.speaker: Baby 5
dialogue.text: 01! quit fixing my collar! stop doing over me like your my wife or something!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: Get away from me, Donquijote Family!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You crazy woman! You're my enemy!

dialogue.speaker: Sai
dialogue.text: How rude! You said you needed me, didn't you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What do you want me to do for you? Anything!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Kakkakakakakakakakakakakakakaka! You really are a few cards short of a full deck! I guess I'll just take you up your offer.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Do me a favor and die.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What sort of repayment would it be if I let you lot...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Run wild and ruin straw hat's plans!?

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: The very least we can do is off one or two executives for them! Prepare yourself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I under- stand. I'll gladly die!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: If that's how I can be of help to you, then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Heh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Oi, wait!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Nothing makes me happier than being able to be of use to another person!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: This is bad news! Now baby S-SAMA is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: idiot, stop it! I was just playing along! Winning by way of your suicide...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Is just gonna leave a bad taste in my mouth!

dialogue.speaker: Sai
dialogue.text: What are you doing, sai!? Leave her be!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Trying to stop the death of an enemy...Have you lost your mind!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: As a leader, you must remain calm!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Shut it, geezer! quit trying to act like my master!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Oi woman!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: This happiness...even in dying, I can be of use.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Why'd we have this kid...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: she won't be of any use to us and yet...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: She'll eat an entire person's share of food.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: We can't afford to feed this mouth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: leave that kid in the mountains.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: You better not follow me out of here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Mama!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: you won't be of any use to us, and so...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: We have no use for you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Even you, Mama?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: I'm of no use to you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: I, now, am being of use to some- one!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: I'm telling you, quit it, crazy bitch!

dialogue.speaker: Sai
dialogue.text: You're the crazy one, SAI!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: You bring shame to the Happou Navy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: I'll break the both of you at once!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Drill Dragon...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Could it be....!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: The head- butt that split the continent of ice!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: This is my busi- mess! Don't stick your head in!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Drill Nail!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: Quit that dumb shit!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: KyaH!

summary: Sai Defies Old Expectations advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Lao G, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
